scenes.narrative_beat: Beginning: Introduce the primordial gods as the original creators of the universe, majestic and all-powerful.
scenes.action: Extreme close-up of a glowing primordial eye that suddenly expands into a vast cosmic battlefield; sweeping crane and dolly shots reveal majestic celestial light patterns shaping stars and worlds.
scenes.narration_segment: In the beginning, there was only the primordial gods — majestic, eternal, and all-powerful creators of the cosmos. Their divine light shaped the void, birthing stars, worlds, and the very fabric of existence itself.

scenes.narrative_beat: Turning Point: The younger Titans rise in rebellion, igniting a fierce, earth-shattering battle that challenges the old order.
scenes.action: Handheld and quick whip pan shots show the younger Titans rising, their fierce expressions and power surging; cosmic wind and star pulses set vastness; orchestral strings swell as battle ignites.
scenes.narration_segment: But from their own bloodline, the younger Titans rose — fierce, rebellious, hungry for power. A cosmic war erupted, shaking galaxies, as these titanic forces clashed in a brutal battle for supremacy.

scenes.narrative_beat: Climactic battle: Flames of chaos blaze through the heavens, celestial bodies shatter, and the fate of existence hangs in the balance.
scenes.action: Rapid cuts of explosive battle scenes with flames, shattered celestial bodies, and intense clashes of divine weapons; aggressive brass and rhythmic percussion heighten chaos and violence.
scenes.narration_segment: Flames of chaos blazed through the heavens, celestial bodies shattered, and the fate of all existence hung in the balance.

scenes.narrative_beat: Resolution: The victorious gods establish a new cosmic order, forever changing the fate of the universe and mortals alike.
scenes.action: Locked off steady shots of victorious gods standing amid calm cosmic light patterns; music transitions to solemn, reverent theme with soft choir and sustained strings; gentle cosmic hum fades.
scenes.narration_segment: In the end, the victorious gods forged a new cosmic order — balanced, yet born from struggle and transformation. This is the story of divine conflict that shaped the universe — reminding us that even gods are born of war, and all power comes with a price.
